tasks.title: Add ExperienceTypePgEnum and ExperiencePriceUnitPgEnum to DB enums
tasks.description: Add `experience_type` (14 values incl OTHER) and `experience_price_unit` (per_day|per_hour|per_person|per_group) PG enums to packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts. Tests: extend the enum snapshot/unit test in packages/db/test verifying both enums export the expected value arrays.

tasks.title: Create ExperienceTypeEnumSchema and ExperiencePriceUnitEnumSchema
tasks.description: Add Zod enum schemas in packages/schemas/src/enums/ mirroring the PG enums (single source of truth, derive from the same const value arrays). Tests: unit test asserting parse success for valid values + rejection for unknown, and value parity with the DB enums.

tasks.title: Write experience.schema.ts (main entity, spreads BaseCommerceListingSchema)
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/experience/experience.schema.ts spreading SPEC-239 BaseCommerceListingSchema + entity fields: type, priceFrom (z.number().int().nonnegative()), priceUnit, isPriceOnRequest (default false). Add ExperienceIdSchema. Tests: unit tests for valid/invalid entity objects, default application, integer/non-negative price enforcement.

tasks.title: Write experience.crud.schema.ts (create/update/patch variants)
tasks.description: Create CreateExperienceSchema, UpdateExperienceSchema, PatchExperienceSchema mirroring accommodation.crud.schema.ts. Separate owner-editable (operational) vs admin-only (identity) field sets so the protected updateOwn route can validate against the operational subset. Tests: unit tests for each variant — required vs optional fields, operational vs admin field partitioning.

tasks.title: Write experience.http.schema.ts (public/protected/admin response shapes)
tasks.description: Create public-tier and admin-tier HTTP request/response schemas mirroring accommodation.http.schema.ts. CRITICAL: public response schema must strip admin/internal fields (follow SPEC-210 public-tier discipline) so subscription-off internals never leak. Tests: unit tests asserting public shape excludes adminInfo/ownerId-sensitive fields, admin shape includes them.

tasks.title: Write experience.query.schema.ts + experience.admin-search.schema.ts
tasks.description: Public list/filter query schema (type, destination, page, pageSize, sort) and admin-search schema (adds hasActiveSubscription, ownerId, lifecycleState, moderationState). Tests: unit tests for query coercion, pagination bounds, filter validation.

tasks.title: Write experience.relations.schema.ts
tasks.description: Relations schema with reviews, faqs, hours, amenities, features, destination — mirrors accommodation.relations.schema.ts and reuses SPEC-239 polymorphic sub-schemas where available. Tests: unit test composing a full relations object and asserting nested validation.

tasks.title: Create experiences.dbschema.ts (main table)
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/experience/experiences.dbschema.ts per spec domain model. Indexes: (slug), (destination_id), (owner_id), (type), (has_active_subscription, lifecycle_state). Reuse BaseCommerceListing column shape from SPEC-239. Tests: table introspection / column-presence unit test.

tasks.title: Create experience_reviews.dbschema.ts
tasks.description: Polymorphic-parallel review table (experienceId FK, userId FK, title, content, rating jsonb, averageRating numeric, lifecycleState, moderationState, audit). UNIQUE (experienceId, userId) for one-review-per-user. Tests: unique constraint + FK introspection test.

tasks.title: Create experience_faqs.dbschema.ts
tasks.description: FAQ table (experienceId FK, question, answer, category, displayOrder int, lifecycleState, audit). Tests: FK + displayOrder default introspection test.

tasks.title: Opening hours as jsonb on experiences (gastronomy parity, no separate table)
tasks.description: Resolved by parity with gastronomy: opening hours stored as an openingHours jsonb column on the experiences table (T-008), NOT a separate experience_hours table. The spec default (structured table) was overridden because the SPEC-239 core uses jsonb for all commerce listings.

tasks.title: Create r_experience_amenity + r_experience_feature join tables
tasks.description: Two polymorphic join tables referencing existing amenities and features tables. Tests: FK introspection test for both joins.

tasks.title: Generate, review and apply migration
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:generate, review the generated migration file (enums + 6 tables + indexes), commit the migration, then pnpm db:migrate + pnpm db:apply-extras. Verify drift guard is clean (db:generate again yields no diff). No extras needed unless has_active_subscription becomes a DB trigger. Tests: migration applies cleanly against a fresh DB; drift guard green.

tasks.title: Add experiences seed data (3-5 entries)
tasks.description: Add seed entries in packages/seed covering different types/units/destinations + at least one isPriceOnRequest and one with hasActiveSubscription=true, plus a COMMERCE_OWNER owner. Tests: seed runs without error; seeded rows count assertion. BLOCKED: worktree dev DB template (hospeda_template) is stale (pre-SPEC-239, no gastronomies tables), so a full db:seed fails. Needs a DB strategy decision (rebuild template / db:push branch schema) before seeding.

tasks.title: Create experience.permissions.ts
tasks.description: Add EXPERIENCE_* PermissionEnum values (VIEW_ALL, CREATE, UPDATE_ALL, UPDATE_OWN, DELETE, MANAGE_REVIEWS, MANAGE_SUBSCRIPTION) to @repo/schemas permission enum + service-core permission mapping, mirroring accommodation.permissions.ts and reusing SPEC-239 COMMERCE permission category. Tests: unit test for permission-to-role assignment matrix.

tasks.title: Create experience.helpers.ts + experience.normalizers.ts
tasks.description: Slug generator, price formatting (priceFrom + unit vs isPriceOnRequest), type-label i18n key resolution; input normalizers (slug lowercase+dash, priceFrom integer coercion). Tests (TDD, pure logic): unit tests for slug edge cases, price formatting including on-request, integer coercion.

tasks.title: Create experience.service.ts (extends BaseCommerceListingService)
tasks.description: ExperienceService extending SPEC-239 BaseCommerceListingService with entity-specific overrides (validateType, pricingBlock) and inheriting review/FAQ/hours/amenity lifecycle, subscription toggle hook, owner-scoping guards, permission checks. Tests: unit tests for CRUD, owner-scoping guard (non-owner cannot update operational fields of others), subscription toggle flipping hasActiveSubscription, pricing formatting.

tasks.title: Create experience.types.ts (service input/output types)
tasks.description: Service-layer input/output types derived from the Zod schemas (z.infer) — CreateExperienceInput, UpdateExperienceInput, ExperienceOutput, etc. Tests: typecheck-only (no runtime); ensure no `any`.

tasks.title: Public API routes (list, getById, getBySlug, reviews)
tasks.description: apps/api/src/routes/experience/public/* using route factories. Enforce visibility gate: only lifecycleState=ACTIVE + hasActiveSubscription=true; 404 otherwise. Use public-tier response schema (T-005). Tests: integration tests for list filtering, slug 404 on subscription-off, public field-strip leak guard.

tasks.title: Protected API routes (updateOwn, review create/delete)
tasks.description: PATCH /protected/experiences/:id restricted to operational fields + COMMERCE_OWNER ownership; review create (PENDING moderation, one-per-user) and delete. Tests: integration tests — owner can update operational only, admin-only fields rejected, non-owner 403, review create sets PENDING.

tasks.title: Admin API routes (CRUD + toggle-subscription + FAQs + hours + reviews)
tasks.description: Full admin route tree under /admin/experiences: create, list, getById, update, delete, restore, toggle-subscription, faqs CRUD+reorder, hours upsert/delete, review moderation. Permission-gated per spec matrix. Tests: integration tests for each endpoint incl permission denial, toggle-subscription flips visibility, FAQ reorder.

tasks.title: API integration tests + update endpoint-gate-matrix
tasks.description: Cross-cutting integration test sweep for all experience endpoints (tier auth, permission gates, visibility) and update docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md. Tests: this task IS the integration test layer; assert 90% coverage on routes/experience.

tasks.title: i18n keys: experience.json for es/en/pt
tasks.description: Add packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/experience.json with meta, index, detail, type (14), priceUnit (4), priceOnRequest, filters, reviews, faq keys per spec. Tests: i18n key-parity test (es/en/pt have identical key sets).

tasks.title: ExperienceCard.astro + ExperiencePriceTag.astro
tasks.description: Card for index grid + price tag component (priceFrom+unit or 'Consultar'). CSS Modules, design tokens, no Tailwind. Tests: component render test for priceOnRequest vs numeric, type badge, rating display.

tasks.title: ExperienceGrid.astro + ExperienceFilters.client.tsx
tasks.description: Responsive grid wrapper + type/destination filter island (React). Tests: filter island unit test (filter state, URL sync); grid render test.

tasks.title: /[lang]/experiencias/index.astro (listing page, SSR)
tasks.description: SSR listing page fetching the public list endpoint (paginated, filtered), i18n es/en/pt, empty state. Tests: page integration test (SSR fetch, only active+subscribed shown, filter param passthrough).

tasks.title: ExperienceHero + ExperienceInfo + ExperienceContactCTA
tasks.description: Detail hero (name/type/pricing), info block (hours/amenities/features/contact), contact CTA (WhatsApp deep link wa.me/<phone>?text= + contact block). CSS Modules. Tests: render tests incl WhatsApp link construction + no-booking assertion.

tasks.title: ExperienceFaqs.astro + ExperienceReviews.client.tsx
tasks.description: Static SSR FAQ accordion + interactive reviews island (aggregate rating + list + submit, mirrors accommodation reviews UX). Tests: FAQ render test; reviews island unit test (submit sets pending, one-per-user guard surfaced).

tasks.title: /[lang]/experiencias/[slug].astro (detail page, SSR)
tasks.description: SSR detail page via getBySlug public endpoint, 404 guard for inactive/subscription-off, assembling hero/info/contact/faqs/reviews. Tests: page integration test (404 on subscription-off, full render on active).

tasks.title: Web component tests
tasks.description: Vitest + testing-library component tests covering cards, filters, price tag, contact CTA, reviews island where applicable. Tests: this task IS the web test layer; assert coverage target on apps/web experience components.

tasks.title: Admin experience list page
tasks.description: apps/admin .../experiencias/index.tsx with filters + pagination, TanStack Query + Table, Tailwind v4. Tests: route render + query wiring test.

tasks.title: Admin experience create/edit form (all fields + subscription toggle)
tasks.description: new.tsx + $id.edit.tsx with TanStack Form + Zod safeParse, all admin fields incl COMMERCE_OWNER assignment + subscription toggle. Tests: form validation test, owner-assignment, toggle wiring.

tasks.title: Admin experience detail / view page
tasks.description: $id.tsx view page showing all fields + subscription state + relations summary. Tests: render test.

tasks.title: Admin FAQ management section (reuse FaqManager from SPEC-177)
tasks.description: $id.faqs.tsx reusing the generic FaqManager (dnd reorder, per-item CRUD, category datalist) from SPEC-177 if available. Tests: reorder + CRUD interaction test.

tasks.title: Admin review moderation list (approve/reject)
tasks.description: $id.reviews.tsx review moderation list with approve/reject actions. Tests: moderation action wiring test.

tasks.title: Owner-scoped edit form (protected, operational fields only)
tasks.description: Owner-facing edit surface (admin panel protected section per default micro-decision #6) exposing only operational fields; warns when hasActiveSubscription=false. Tests: field-restriction test (admin-only fields absent), hidden-warning test.

tasks.title: Update route-architecture.md with experience routes
tasks.description: Document the new experience public/protected/admin routes in apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md.

tasks.title: Update endpoint-gate-matrix for experience permissions
tasks.description: Add experience permission rows to docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md (complements T-022's route doc). (Done together with T-022, which already added the experience rows to endpoint-gate-matrix.md.)

tasks.title: Smoke test (admin create -> toggle -> public visible -> review -> approve)
tasks.description: End-to-end manual/automated smoke: create 1 experience via admin, toggle subscription on, verify public listing + detail page, submit a review, approve it. Document result. Tests: scripted e2e where feasible, else documented manual smoke checklist.

tasks.title: Closeout: update indexes + prioritization CSV
tasks.description: Flip .qtm/specs/index.json + .qtm/tasks/index.json + specs-prioritization.csv to completed status per index-sync rules. Tests: n/a (governance).
